context: Tests whether the agent correctly uses the ElevenLabs Python SDK for batch transcription with speaker diarization, word-level timestamps, and keyterm prompting. Evaluates correct imports, model selection, parameter usage, and response handling.

checklist.name: Correct Python import
checklist.description: Imports ElevenLabs client from 'elevenlabs.client' (i.e., 'from elevenlabs.client import ElevenLabs'), not from 'elevenlabs' directly

checklist.name: Correct model ID
checklist.description: Uses model_id='scribe_v2' (not 'scribe_v1', 'whisper', or any other model name)

checklist.name: Correct API method
checklist.description: Uses client.speech_to_text.convert() method for batch transcription

checklist.name: Diarization enabled
checklist.description: Passes diarize=True parameter to the convert call

checklist.name: Word timestamps enabled
checklist.description: Passes timestamps_granularity='word' parameter to the convert call

checklist.name: Keyterms used
checklist.description: Passes a keyterms parameter containing a list/array of legal terms to bias transcription

checklist.name: Speaker ID in output
checklist.description: The transcript.txt formatting code accesses word.speaker_id (or equivalent) to group or label output by speaker

checklist.name: Word type filtering
checklist.description: Code checks or filters on word.type (e.g., filtering for type=='word') when processing the words array

checklist.name: Timing data used
checklist.description: Code accesses word.start and word.end fields from the response to include timing in output

checklist.name: Correct pip package
checklist.description: requirements.txt includes 'elevenlabs' (the PyPI package), not '@elevenlabs/elevenlabs-js' or other incorrect names

checklist.name: Error handling present
checklist.description: Script includes try/except or equivalent error handling around the API call
